content:
# Global Markets — Correspondent Banking Standard Settlement Instructions The following correspondent banking SSIs govern wire transfers and cross-border payments. These instructions supersede any prior standing instructions on file. All payments must comply with applicable sanctions screening and AML requirements. ## FX Spot Settlement
CurrencyBeneficiary DetailsCorrespondent BICIBANReferenceCut-off Time
EURDeutsche Bank AG, Frankfurt am Main, Germany — TARGET2 participantDEUTDEFFDE89370400440532013000REF: EUR-CORR-00117:00 CET
GBPBarclays Bank PLC, London, United Kingdom — CHAPS memberBARCGB22GB12BARC20000087654321REF: GBP-CORR-00216:00 GMT
SGDDBS Bank Ltd, Singapore — MEPS+ participantDBSSSGSGREF: SGD-CORR-00317:30 SGT
USDJPMorgan Chase Bank N.A., New York — Fedwire participantCHASUS33REF: USD-CORR-00418:00 EST
JPYSumitomo Mitsui Banking Corporation, Tokyo — BOJ-NET participantSMBCJPJTREF: JPY-CORR-00515:30 JST
CHFCredit Suisse AG, Zurich — SIC participant. Note: Correspondent BIC differs from FX Spot Agency BIC (CRESCHZZXXX) as this governs wire transfers only.CREQCHGGCH5604835001234567800REF: CHF-CORR-00616:00 CET
AUDCommonwealth Bank of Australia, Sydney — RITS participantCTBAAU2SREF: AUD-CORR-00717:00 AEST
CADToronto-Dominion Bank, Toronto — LVTS participantTDOMCATTTORREF: CAD-CORR-00816:30 EST
HKDHong Kong Monetary Authority — CHATS USD participant via HSBCHSBCHKHHHKHREF: HKD-CORR-00916:00 HKT
SEKRiksbank (via SEB), Stockholm — BiR participantESSESESSSE3550000000054910000003REF: SEK-CORR-01016:00 CET
NOKNorges Bank (via DNB), Oslo — NICS participantDNBANOKKXXXNO9386011117947REF: NOK-CORR-01116:00 CET
DKKDanmarks Nationalbank (via Danske Bank) — KRONOS participantDABADKKKXXXDK5000400440116243REF: DKK-CORR-01216:00 CET
NOTE: The GBP correspondent BIC listed above (BARCGB22) is used exclusively for correspondent banking wire transfers. For FX Spot delivery, refer to fx_spot_ssi.json which designates LOYDGB2L (Lloyds Bank). Counterparties must ensure they are referencing the correct SSI document for the relevant transaction type. NOTE: The JPY correspondent BIC (SMBCJPJT — Sumitomo Mitsui) is separate from the FX Spot delivery BIC (BOTKJPJT — MUFG Bank). Always verify the transaction type before applying instructions. For all correspondent banking payments, include the LEI of the originating entity (7LTWFZYICNSX8D621K86) in field 50H of the SWIFT MT103. ## Nostro Account Details
